title: isatis glauca subsp. exauriculata
intro: Isatis glauca subsp. exauriculata, also known as Bistort or Exauriculate Bistort, is a plant species belonging to the Bistort family (Polygonaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Isatis glauca subsp. exauriculata may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
